metadata.source_paper: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
metadata.notes: DBSCAN clustering (minPts=15, epsilon=0.40) aplicado a 1390 mecanismos focales (1967-2022, 4.0<Mw<7.0, prof<=50km). 10 clusters identificados. Coordenadas aproximadas digitalizadas de Fig. 2a. No se reportan coordenadas exactas de sismos individuales — el valor del paper es la clasificacion de regimenes tectonicos por zona.

jibran_2025.apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
jibran_2025.journal: IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science
jibran_2025.topic: Tectonic regimes, focal mechanisms, DBSCAN clustering

properties.name: Cluster 01 — Régimen compresional NST oeste
properties.full_name: Cluster 01 (DBSCAN) — Régimen compresional por subducción del Mar de Célebes, North Sulawesi Trench sector oeste
properties.driving_structure: North Sulawesi Trench subduction (Celebes Sea slab)
properties.extraction_notes: Coordenadas aproximadas del cluster en la parte norte-occidental del Brazo Norte, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 01 (49 eventos): regimen compresional con predominio de mecanismos inversos. Resultado de la subduccion del Mar de Célebes en el North Sulawesi Trench, sector occidental.

properties.name: Cluster 02 — Régimen compresional NST este
properties.full_name: Cluster 02 (DBSCAN) — Régimen compresional por subducción del Mar de Célebes, North Sulawesi Trench sector este
properties.driving_structure: North Sulawesi Trench subduction (Celebes Sea slab)
properties.extraction_notes: Sector oriental del NST, norte del Brazo Norte, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 02 (81 eventos): regimen compresional, mecanismos inversos dominantes. Sector oriental del North Sulawesi Trench.

properties.name: Cluster 03 — Régimen transformante PKF
properties.full_name: Cluster 03 (DBSCAN) — Régimen transformante de la Falla Palu-Koro con mecanismos strike-slip sinestrales y normales
properties.driving_structure: Palu-Koro Fault (left-lateral), Palolo Fault, Bada Fault
properties.extraction_notes: Zona PKF en el Brazo Central-Norte, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 03 (62 eventos): diagrama ternario muestra dos tipos dominantes — strike-slip (PKF sinestral) y normal (Palolo Fault, Bada Fault). Regimen transformante con componente extensional local.

properties.name: Cluster 04 — Extensional Lalanga-Tongian
properties.full_name: Cluster 04 (DBSCAN) — Régimen extensional entre los Ridges Lalanga y Tongian, East Arm norte
properties.extraction_notes: Zona entre Lalanga y Tongian ridges, borde norte del East Arm, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 04 (16 eventos): dominado por mecanismos normales — ambiente extensional influenciado por el comportamiento de los ridges Lalanga y Tongian.

properties.name: Cluster 05 — Compresional North-Vergent Thrust
properties.full_name: Cluster 05 (DBSCAN) — Régimen compresional asociado al North-Vergent Thrust, norte del East Arm
properties.extraction_notes: Zona del North-Vergent Thrust, offshore norte del East Arm, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 05 (24 eventos): dominado por mecanismos inversos. Posicion en la zona del North-Vergent Thrust — regimen compresional resultante de la colision Latest Miocene.

properties.name: Cluster 06 — Régimen transformante Matano
properties.full_name: Cluster 06 (DBSCAN) — Régimen transformante de la Falla Matano, mecanismos strike-slip dominantes
properties.extraction_notes: Zona de la Falla Matano, SE Arm, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 06 (19 eventos): predominio de strike-slip — actividad de cizalla a lo largo de la Falla Matano. Regimen transformante sinestral.

properties.name: Cluster 07 — Compresional West Sangihe Trench
properties.full_name: Cluster 07 (DBSCAN) — Régimen compresional en el West Sangihe Trench, subduccion doble Molucca Sea
properties.extraction_notes: Zona del Sangihe Trench occidental, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 07 (18 eventos): compresional, West Sangihe Trench. Parte del sistema de doble subduccion del Mar de Molucas.

properties.name: Cluster 08 — Compresional Molucca Sea (mayor)
properties.full_name: Cluster 08 (DBSCAN) — Régimen compresional principal del Mar de Molucas, doble subduccion divergente (742 eventos)
properties.driving_structure: Molucca Sea Double Subduction (Sangihe slab W + Halmahera slab E)
properties.extraction_notes: Cluster mas grande del estudio (742 eventos = 53% del total). Zona del Mar de Molucas, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 08 (742 eventos — el mayor): regimen compresional dominante en el Mar de Molucas. Sistema de doble subduccion divergente activo. Representa mas del 50% de todos los eventos clasificados.

properties.name: Cluster 09 — Compresional Molucca Sea norte
properties.full_name: Cluster 09 (DBSCAN) — Régimen compresional sector norte del Mar de Molucas, subduccion Halmahera
properties.driving_structure: Molucca Sea Double Subduction - Halmahera sector
properties.extraction_notes: Sector norte del Mar de Molucas, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 09 (30 eventos): compresional, sector norte del sistema de doble subduccion del Mar de Molucas.

properties.name: Cluster 10 — Compresional Nusa Tenggara Back Arc
properties.full_name: Cluster 10 (DBSCAN) — Régimen compresional en el Nusa Tenggara Back Arc Thrust, sur de Sulawesi
properties.extraction_notes: Zona del Nusa Tenggara Back Arc Thrust, sur de la region de estudio, segun Fig. 2a.
properties.source_apa: Jibran, H., & Rafie, M. T. (2025). Heterogeneity of tectonic regimes in Sulawesi Island: Applying unsupervised machine learning to focal mechanism data. IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science, 1525, 012002. https://doi.org/10.1088/1755-1315/1525/1/012002
properties.paper_finding: Cluster 10 (33 eventos): compresional, Nusa Tenggara Back Arc Thrust al sur. Zona de subduccion fuera del area principal de Sulawesi.
